name: replaceitem
syntax: /replaceitem block <position: x y z> slot.container <slotId: int> [oldItemHandling: ReplaceMode] <itemName: Item> [amount: int] [data: int] [components: json] | /replaceitem entity <target: target> <slotType: EntityEquipmentSlot> <slotId: int> [oldItemHandling: ReplaceMode] <itemName: Item> [amount: int] [data: int] [components: json]
description: 替换方块或实体指定槽位中的物品

parameters.name: block <position: x y z> slot.container <slotId: int> <itemName: Item> [amount: int] [data: int] [components: json]
parameters.description: 替换容器方块指定槽位中的物品。slotId从0开始

parameters.name: block <position: x y z> slot.container <slotId: int> <oldItemHandling: destroy|keep> <itemName: Item> [amount: int] [data: int] [components: json]
parameters.description: 替换容器方块指定槽位中的物品，指定旧物品处理方式。destroy=销毁旧物品，keep=保留旧物品（槽位非空时不替换）

parameters.name: entity <target: target> <slotType: EntityEquipmentSlot> <slotId: int> <itemName: Item> [amount: int] [data: int] [components: json]
parameters.description: 替换实体指定槽位中的物品。slotType: slot.weapon.mainhand、slot.weapon.offhand、slot.armor.head/chest/legs/feet、slot.hotbar、slot.inventory、slot.enderchest等

parameters.name: entity <target: target> <slotType: EntityEquipmentSlot> <slotId: int> <oldItemHandling: destroy|keep> <itemName: Item> [amount: int] [data: int] [components: json]
parameters.description: 替换实体指定槽位中的物品，指定旧物品处理方式

examples.description: 将自己主手替换为钻石剑
给所有玩家头部装上钻石头盔
在坐标(0,64,0)的容器第一个槽位放入64个钻石
仅当主手为空时才放入钻石剑

bedrock_specific_notes: 基岩版使用replaceitem而非Java版的item replace命令。槽位类型名称与Java版不同，基岩版使用slot.weapon.mainhand等格式。oldItemHandling参数可选destroy（默认）或keep。
